headline: Paramount Skydance’s US$24b WBD Bid Tests Valuation And Deal Odds
summary: Paramount Skydance has lined up $24b in funding from Middle Eastern sovereign wealth funds to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery. The new financing structure adds major Gulf investors to the deal, subject to shareholder approval and regulatory review. Upcoming shareholder votes and regulatory checks will determine if the acquisition of NasdaqGS:WBD moves ahead. Warner Bros. Discovery (NasdaqGS:WBD) last closed at $27.55, with a value score of 1 and a 1 year return of 197.5%. Over 3 years the...
